name: Miniature Puff Appetizers and Fillings
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Dried french onion soup mix
1 Box (10 1/2-oz) frozen - chopped, thawed and drained spinach
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Heat water and butter/margarine in a saucepan until boiling. Stir in flour all at once and beat over low heat until the mixture leaves the sides of the pan and forms a ball. Remove from heat. Beat eggs into the mixture thoroughly, one at a time, until smooth and velvety. Using a spoon or pressing with a pastry bag, drop balls about the size of a thimble onto an ungreased baking sheet. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until puffs are golden brown and dry. Puffs may be made in advance and covered loosely with paper towel to soften slightly before filling. Slice each puff in half and fill with one of the desired fillings.
